title: The Occultation
content:
When the cloud shut down on the morning shine,
     And darkened the sun,
    I said, "So ended that joy of mine
     Years back begun."

    But day continued its lustrous roll
     In upper air;
    And did my late irradiate soul
     Live on somewhere?
meaning:
Thomas Hardy's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "The Occultation"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
